sections.paragraph:
ἀπογνωρίζω dispossess, reject pass. ἀπογνωρίζεσθαι ἀπὸ τ. ζωῆς be dispossessed of one’s life Hv 2, 2, 8; in wordplay w. ἀρνέομαι: deny-disaffirm.—DELG s.v. γιγνώσκω.

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

Hv Hv = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 108
